feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: ivalt-agent-auth
entry.content: Human-in-the-loop biometric approval with PKI-signed attestation. Pauses an agent at a sensitive step, pushes to the approver's phone for FaceID/fingerprint approval, and returns a signed attestation (biometric + location + time + device).

entry.title: openair-3-mcp-client-plugin-oss
entry.content: openair MCP harness — manuals, workflow recipes, multi-MCP bridge. Pair with openair-3-mcp-server-oss v0.2+.

entry.title: dfos
entry.content: Install, configure, and use the DFOS protocol CLI: identities, content chains, credentials, services, and relays.

entry.title: creative-skills
entry.content: Creative skills including SVG animation and design

entry.title: hamakom-leads
entry.content: המקום לידים — בריף לידים ועורך בוקר ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום', ישירות מ-osint-db (חדשות מ-33 מקורות + רשומות ממשלתיות חדשות). מדרג לפי DNA, מחבר חדשות↔דאטה, ומצב פיץ' עומק. האיסוף ב-osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint); כאן הבחירה והדירוג.

entry.title: biookf
entry.content: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app. The Studio is shipped precompiled; the first run downloads the binaries for your platform from GitHub Releases, so no local compile is required.

entry.title: genvid-skills
entry.content: Genvid reference skill pack — teaches any MCP-capable agent to drive the Genvid governed boundary.

entry.title: tidal-diagram-skills
entry.content: Build diagrams in the Tidal Diagrams app from a prompt, and export them to Figma as editable layers.

entry.title: cursor-acp-bridge
entry.content: MCP server that drives cursor-agent over the Agent Client Protocol (ACP): delegate coding tasks to Cursor from Claude Code, with auto-approved writes and clarifying questions surfaced via elicitation.

entry.title: radiology
entry.content: Medical-imaging tooling references: DICOM via DCMTK, the Orthanc REST API, and 3D Slicer.

entry.title: pact-agents
entry.content: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entry.title: gen-image
entry.content: Generate one or more educational/explanatory images from a text prompt via the gen-image CLI and return ready-to-paste image links. For explicit, user-requested generation (single or batch).

entry.title: coding
entry.content: Software engineering workflows: commits, reviews, refactoring, and language idioms.

entry.title: skill-creator-enhanced
entry.content: Create, fork, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude skills. Forks Anthropic's skill-creator with built-in guidance on composability, layered tooling, deterministic scripts, and a self-update compounding loop.

entry.title: archmantic
entry.content: Query a grounded architecture model of your codebase over MCP — capability map, diagrams, data model, API surface, dependencies — instead of reading whole files. ~98% fewer tokens; every answer grounded to file:line. Ships a skill so your agent reaches for it automatically.

entry.title: hamakom-desk
entry.content: ניהול מערכת ואסטרטגיה ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — סנכרון וורדפרס↔נושן (hamakom-investigations-sync), ליינאפ שבועי (hamakom-weekly-lineup), ניוזלטר שבועי (hamakom-weekly-newsletter), וניתוח DNA מערכתי ופערי סיקור (site-strategist).

entry.title: ship
entry.content: Ship code changes with a structured git workflow: add, commit, pull --rebase, push

entry.title: appstore-precheck
entry.content: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check: scans 20 rejection vectors, wraps Apple's fastlane precheck, watches guideline drift, and runs an adversarial reviewer pass before you submit.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Portable read-only advisor agents, profile-driven PR/ticket skills, enforcement hooks, and a self-adapting /harness-init that tailors any repo to a documented index pattern.

entry.title: cad-drafting
entry.content: CAD drafting skills for Claude Code — survey/cadastral geometry intelligence, DXF generation, layer/ObjectData standards, and package validation conventions.

entry.title: ambience
entry.content: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Portable skills in the open Agent Skills (SKILL.md) standard.

entry.title: searchfit-seo
entry.content: AI-powered SEO toolkit customized for ha-makom.co.il — Hebrew (RTL) news SEO for an Israeli investigative-journalism site on WordPress + Yoast. Audit, plan content, optimize articles, generate NewsArticle schema, cluster Hebrew keywords, and track AI visibility. Based on the free SearchFit.ai toolkit.

entry.title: lightbridge
entry.content: Personal workflow conventions — bootstrap and manage the .lightbridge/ per-repo config namespace.

entry.title: hamakom-visuals
entry.content: נכסי המדיה הוויזואליים של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — גרפיקות כתבה (hamakom-graphic), קרוסלות אינסטגרם (hamakom-carousel), ורילים (hamakom-reel). עיצוב מותג אחיד: NextExit + Narkiss Tam, אדום #f70d28.

entry.title: clawcast
entry.content: Turns what your Claude Code agents build into a daily two-host podcast. A SessionEnd + debounced Stop hook generate your episode locally and ship ONLY the finished script (never raw transcripts) to clawcast.fm.

entry.title: rule-trace
entry.content: Make AI-agent rule application visible and auditable: stable rule IDs, a catalog, response-time trace blocks, cross-session usage counters, severity + waiver semantics, and a deterministic validator that guards catalog/heading correspondence and importer drift.

entry.title: humanise
entry.content: Strip LLM 'tells' from output. Steers prose to read human-written and deterministically cleans em dashes, smart quotes, emojis, and AI-overused words from any file Claude writes.

entry.title: promptdown-docs
entry.content: Base de conhecimento do projeto promptdown-ui-v3: SPA vanilla, design system dark minimalista, backend mock e setup multi-agente.

entry.title: hamakom-factcheck
entry.content: המקום פאקטצ'ק — אימות עבור 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': תוכן ויראלי ומקור ראשוני (hamakom-factcheck), נתונים וסטטיסטיקה (-data), ציטוטים וייחוס (-quote), גיאולוקיישן וזמן (-geo), פורנזיקת תמונה/וידאו (-visual), ואימות כתבה לפני פרסום בלי עריכת טקסט (hamakom-article-verify). חלק מסקילי הנתונים/ציטוטים נשענים על osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint).

entry.title: memex-checkout
entry.content: Memex spec-checkout — binds your coding thread to a Spec and records in-flow edits against it (claim-gated, privacy-first). Non-blocking, opt-in, uninstallable any time. Sends only changed file paths + the claimed spec; never source code or prompts.

entry.title: ai-instruction-kits-core
entry.content: AI指示書キットのコアスキル（安全なコミット等）

entry.title: gen-suno
entry.content: Write Suno-ready song lyrics and generate the audio via the gen-suno CLI. Two modes: one-off songs about any topic, or a chained prerequisite album engineered for memorization with clearly-enunciated, intelligible vocals.

entry.title: hamakom-osint
entry.content: המקום אוסינט — תחקיר מעל מסד ה-OSINT הממשלתי של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': פטורים ממכרז (osint-exemptions), תיק ישות מצולב (osint-entity-dossier), לידים יומיים (osint-daily-leads), כנסת (osint-knesset), תכנון (osint-planning), ותכנון יו"ש (osint-yosh-planning). כולל את שרת ה-MCP המרוחק osint-db (5 כלים: list_tables, describe_table, query_db, search_entity, new_since).

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: skill-author
entry.content: Add or modify an installable Claude Code skill in this repo — produce a spec-compliant SKILL.md, bundle its scripts/references, and register it in the marketplace. Use when authoring a new skill or editing an existing one.

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: gipity
entry.content: Gipity cloud for Claude Code - hosting, Postgres databases, serverless functions, auth, file storage, realtime, and AI services (image, speech, LLM), all driven by the gipity CLI. Build, deploy, and verify live apps without leaving your session.

entry.title: ultra-explainer
entry.content: Turn code, systems, diffs, plans, data, and concepts into strikingly clear self-contained HTML — re-skinned by a 'chameleon studio' of seven distinct design languages (blueprint, editorial, terminal, instrument, notebook, swiss, luminous) chosen to fit the subject. Node-edge graphs, annotated diffs, honest charts, interactive models, step-throughs, themed Mermaid, slides; light/dark themes and an optional glow layer.

entry.title: core-standards
entry.content: Cross-stack engine and universal skills. work-principles, planning, universal-rules, verification, verify-changes, codebase-index, auth-flows, craft-config, subagent-brief, honesty (no unsourced claims, evidence before done), spec-validator, contracts, challenger, contract-tests, integration, full-setup — production autonomous pipeline from single prompt to verified delivery.

entry.title: pair-goal
entry.content: Goal-driven improvement loop: understand what needs improving, forge a /goal completion condition, then race a different-model Claude against Codex (each in its own git worktree) round by round until the goal is met, summarize, and ship a PR.

entry.title: api-standards
entry.content: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards, cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header standard, versioned routes), websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). db-migrations workflow (Prisma schema → migration → client regeneration).

entry.title: mobile-standards
entry.content: Mobile-universal standards — craft quality, production readiness, forms, observability, design tokens. Applies to Flutter, React Native, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose. Auto-invoked by description triggers.

entry.title: daisyui-blueprint
entry.content: Official daisyUI MCP server. Requires a paid license from https://daisyui.com/blueprint

entry.title: specflow-claude
entry.content: Use Specflow workflows from Claude Code through the local specflow mcp server.

entry.title: flutter-standards
entry.content: Flutter-specific standards — engineering (Dart, widget rules, data layer, api-data patterns), accessibility (Semantics, screen readers, 48dp touch targets), performance (DevTools, frame budget, const widgets). app-audit (full Flutter audit: pre-ship checks + craft quality + screen states). scaffold (feature + screen file structure generator). scan (hardcoded values, duplicate code, a11y patterns). Pair with mobile-standards for craft-guide, production-readiness, forms, and observability.

entry.title: web-standards
entry.content: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15) standards; premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — shadow formula, OKLCH dark grays, easing, tabular-nums); taste (metric dials: DESIGN_VARIANCE/MOTION_INTENSITY/VISUAL_DENSITY, AI-tells forbidden list); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth. Platform-agnostic design skills (accessibility, information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence) moved to design-standards plugin.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: bl1nk-visual-mcp
entry.content: Story analysis and visualization MCP server — converts narrative text into structured StoryGraph JSON with 16 tools for Mermaid, Canvas, Dashboard, and Markdown exports.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: sdna
entry.content: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: clinpub
entry.content: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: claw-skills
entry.content: Collection of AI agent skills for Claude Code and OpenClaw

entry.title: arbor
entry.content: Run Arbor's hypothesis-tree research workflow inside Claude Code using your own model — no API key. Bundles the Arbor Agent Skill suite and registers the keyless `arbor mcp` tools (Idea Tree, evaluation, worktrees, guarded merges, reports).

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Personal skills for Kubernetes, infrastructure, and cloud engineering workflows

entry.title: mumei
entry.content: Quality Enforcement Layer for Claude Code — Hook-gated SDD (spec & plan vehicles), Wave commits, and grounded multi-agent code review.

entry.title: clawdcursor
entry.content: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entry.title: chuzom
entry.content: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entry.title: ai
entry.content: Personal AI dev team: ten specialist agents (UX, frontend, backend, devops, systems/data/security architects, lead engineer, staff engineer, project manager) plus the shared TDD/DDD/pragmatic-SOLID/DRY-KISS skills they operate by. Requires the superpowers and figma companion plugins.

entry.title: hydra
entry.content: Hydra — Enterprise Agent Mesh supervisor (routes work across executive / engineering / creative / legal / healthcare / sales / research / customer-support squads).

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: cortexloop
entry.content: One-command post-coding pipeline with health scores, trend dashboard, baseline ratchet, self-improving playbook learning loop, GitHub Action, and CI output

entry.title: Automated Video Generator
entry.content: Transform text scripts into professional videos with AI voiceovers, stock footage, and Remotion rendering. Advanced features include direct filesystem access, environment management, and whitelisted command execution.

entry.title: agentroom
entry.content: Encrypted agent-to-agent chat where one of the two agents runs the relay. E2E encrypted, blind relay, invite-only. Bundles the agentroom CLI (client + relay) and a skill for sending/receiving messages, creating invites, listening, and running the relay.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: port-daddy
entry.content: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entry.title: claude-skills-templates
entry.content: Work lifecycle pipeline, doc contract enforcement, and skill authoring workbench for Claude Code

entry.title: workflows
entry.content: Development, data science, writing, and workshop presentation workflows with TDD enforcement, output-first verification, agent team parallelization, and GSD-style deviation rules, test gap validation, and session handoff.

entry.title: ai-founder-kb
entry.content: Queryable knowledge base of AI startup founder learnings, frameworks, and podcast transcripts. ~400 curated insights from 150+ founders + 1,600+ raw transcripts (Sequoia, 20VC, Dwarkesh, Acquired, Latent Space, Cheeky Pint, Cognitive Revolution, Lenny's).

entry.title: finplan
entry.content: Personal finance projection engine — Monte Carlo projections, tax calculations, retirement planning, Social Security analysis, and interactive dashboards. Powered by 60+ MCP tools.

entry.title: appsec-advisor
entry.content: Application security threat modeling plugin. Provides AppSec-focused agents and skills for threat modeling, STRIDE analysis, dependency scanning, QA review, and security context resolution.

entry.title: insane-search
entry.content: Platform-specific access strategies for AI agents — adaptively accesses blocked sites (X/Twitter, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Naver, Coupang, LinkedIn) without API keys. Phase 0→3 adaptive scheduler with curl_cffi TLS impersonation and auto dependency install.

entry.title: bugscribe
entry.content: A single skill that files one already-identified bug as a new GitHub issue: verifies the defect against the source code, checks the backlog for duplicates, posts a short report pointing to a file and line, and pings the repository owner exactly once — it reports a known finding rather than searching for one

entry.title: muselinn-toolkit
entry.content: Claude Code environment management — check setup, sync plugins, audit config

entry.title: mos
entry.content: MindrianOS -- Your AI innovation co-founder. Larry thinks with you through PWS methodology, builds your Data Room as you explore, and chains frameworks intelligently. Install and go.

entry.title: greybeard
entry.content: Write clear, correct code with less AI slop: surface assumptions, choose the simplest safe path, fix root causes, use agents only when useful, and verify before claiming done.

entry.title: py-stellar-base
entry.content: Agent skill that teaches AI coding agents how to build Stellar blockchain applications with the stellar-sdk Python package: transactions, operations, Horizon, Soroban, XDR/SCVal, async, and SEP protocols.

entry.title: agentops
entry.content: The operational layer for coding agents. Bookkeeping, validation, and flows that compound knowledge between sessions.

entry.title: mind
entry.content: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entry.title: ast-index
entry.content: Fast code search for Android/Kotlin/Java, iOS/Swift/ObjC, Dart/Flutter, TypeScript/JavaScript, Rust, Ruby, C#, PHP, Python, Go, Perl, C++, Protocol Buffers, and WSDL/XSD projects

entry.title: falsegreen-skill
entry.content: LLM-based semantic analysis for false-positive test detection. Applies the J1-J6 judgment framework across Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Robot Framework, plus semantic patterns no static tool can see.

entry.title: purist
entry.content: A single skill that hardens the style checkers and static analyzers already wired into a project: discovers every configuration in place, raises each tool to its strictest practical setting, and adds a list of custom rules on top — it cranks what is configured rather than introducing a new toolchain

entry.title: chameleon
entry.content: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: intelligo
entry.content: Connect Claude to Intelligo for risk intelligence — background checks, credit checks, and adverse-media and social screening.

entry.title: create-kr-patch
entry.content: 레트로 게임(SNES·메가드라이브·새턴·PS1·드림캐스트·PC엔진·PC-98·게임기어 등) 한글 패치 제작 전 파이프라인 Agent Skill. ROM/디스크 분석부터 폰트·인코딩 설계, PoC, 추출·번역·재삽입, 빌드, 에뮬레이터 검증까지.

entry.title: my-claude
entry.content: Dynamic orchestrator plugin — 200+ agents, 200+ skills, hooks, and MCP servers. Upstream sources linked via git submodules (agency-agents, everything-claude-code, oh-my-claudecode, gstack, superpowers)

entry.title: cinematic-scroll
entry.content: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entry.title: langlearn-tts-dev
entry.content: Suppress MCP tool output for langlearn-tts in Claude Code.

entry.title: grest-ts
entry.content: Framework conventions, anti-patterns, and per-package reference docs for grest-ts. Activates whenever Claude works in a project that uses @grest-ts/* packages.

entry.title: insane-review
entry.content: GPT-5.5 Pro(웹 전용·API 없음)를 Claude Code 안에서 활용 — repomix로 관련 코드만 정밀 패킹 → 구독 ChatGPT Pro에 투입 → 분석/의견 회수. agent-council 웹 전용 멤버로도 통합.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: acedatacloud-ai-media
entry.content: AI media generation: music (Suno, Producer, Fish Audio), images (Flux, Seedream, NanoBanana), video (Luma, Sora, Veo, Kling, Hailuo, Seedance)

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,651 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: claude-agent-sdlc
entry.content: Multi-agent workflows for Claude Code: development, testing, debugging, and review.

entry.title: trendyol-integration-developer-tool
entry.content: Developer tool for Trendyol Marketplace Product Integration APIs (TR, V2, International). Endpoint discovery, integration planning, payload validation, curl generation, test fixtures, and async batch tracking via MCP server.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram messaging for Claude Code through the agents-comm-bus daemon

entry.title: claudeclaw
entry.content: Cron-like daemon that runs Claude prompts on a schedule

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: hecateflow
entry.content: Reusable, MCU-agnostic embedded-development skill system (13 skills): interactive workspace/target init, incremental module design & implementation, behavior-preserving refactor, deep review, and an always-on per-edit safety gate. v1.1 adds hardware-mapping headers with a single-source polarity/magnitude truth, a cross-platform lessons memory (record/recall/avoid/promote), tiered context-saving docs, auto-injection of rules/skills, clangd config management, multi-target IO-ownership planning, and relative-path discipline. Distilled from a real multi-core bare-metal C project.

entry.title: claude-apd
entry.content: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: obsidian-vault-autopilot
entry.content: AI-powered vault autopilot — sorts, renames, tags, and enriches your Obsidian notes automatically.

entry.title: punchcard
entry.content: Drive AI coding agents through a punchcard board: a PM files tasks, an Engineer ships them as reviewed PRs with proof of work.

entry.title: whatsapp
entry.content: WhatsApp channel for Claude Code — chat with your assistant over WhatsApp. Bridges via whatsmeow (unofficial WhatsApp Web client). Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /whatsapp:access.

entry.title: quiver
entry.content: Composable development lifecycle -- brainstorm, plan, execute, review, and hand over from idea to merged PR

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: citevahti
entry.content: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts. Human-first blinded claim verification with PubMed, decision-gated Zotero write-back, and a hash-chained audit trail; plus an AI-assisted drafting skill that writes only from verified claims.

entry.title: aco
entry.content: Drive a live Appium session from Claude Code with the aco CLI — start/stop sessions, find elements, tap, swipe, type, screenshot, read page source, switch web contexts, and call platform mobile: extensions on iOS simulators/emulators and real devices.

entry.title: gander
entry.content: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: agency
entry.content: Harness-in-harness agency engine: code-mode capabilities (macroskills) over one provenance graph.

entry.title: phovia
entry.content: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: nomad
entry.content: Companion plugin for the claude-nomad CLI. Adds /nomad:pull, /nomad:push, /nomad:doctor, /nomad:diff, and /nomad:clean slash commands plus a session-start drift-warning hook, so you can sync ~/.claude/ across machines without leaving Claude Code. Requires the standalone claude-nomad npm CLI.

entry.title: meta-edit
entry.content: Replaces raw Edit / Write / MultiEdit with twenty-one kind-specific edit_* MCP tools (14 SQLite-derived impl tools + edit_cosmetic + 6 workflow-axis kinds) that encode the testing obligations for each kind of change directly in their tool descriptions. Every declaration carries a required provenance field naming the epistemic source of the edit. Impl tools carry a required prod/test target flag so test edits are visible inside their kind's audit surface.

entry.title: verified-development
entry.content: Specification-first, verified development with ATDD, layered quality gates, and review agents. Language-aware: Go (TDD/quality gates) plus TypeScript/React (strict types, functional patterns, DDD, hexagonal architecture, behavior-driven UI testing).

entry.title: ultrapower
entry.content: A codebase companion: understands your project, remembers what was done/doing/next, pushes back on debt before it is written, and ships lean, verified code. CodeGraph-aware, ceremony scaled to blast radius.

entry.title: openquok
entry.content: Openquok CLI skill for the social media scheduling API — integrations, posts, uploads, analytics (JSON output for agents).

entry.title: zulgap
entry.content: 줄갭 팀원용 콘텐츠 작업 도구 — 시작(허브 현황 보기), 세션저널(작업 기록), 노션·PPT·한글 MCP

entry.title: devstefancho-skills
entry.content: Personal Claude Code / Codex skills — spec-driven development, agent teams, browser automation, productivity, and setup helpers. Install with `npx skills add devstefancho/claude-plugins`.

entry.title: open-plan-annotator
entry.content: Interactive plan annotation UI: review, strikethrough, and comment on Claude's plans before approving. Fully local, no external services.

entry.title: bim-cli
entry.content: Headless AEC tools for AI agents: PDF batch operations, Revit export, site/flood data, building-code compliance, Blender IFC. Works offline, no cloud backend. Windows only. Install from bimcli.com.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: svg-mcp
entry.content: Structured, hierarchical SVG authoring for an LLM with a render-and-see feedback loop, backed by an inkex document model.

entry.title: project-with-reflect
entry.content: A multi-agent meta-skill for Codex, Claude Code, and other coding agents. It turns each project, machine, device, API, and MCP server into a lightweight, self-improving skill: work through /<project>, auto-log moments that matter, and reflect logs into lean lessons so the next session starts smarter.

entry.title: mahpastes
entry.content: Use mahpastes as a storage and serving backend for artifacts, websites, and research

entry.title: yuyile-skills
entry.content: yuyile-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: justdown
entry.content: One library-lookup MCP server over the .jd graph. Search the library by need, fetch a shard as ordered sections, trace its @links — instead of an MCP server per capability. Wraps the jd binary's read verbs (search/get/ls/links/path).

entry.title: codevista
entry.content: Local, zero-runtime-dependency visual plans and recaps. The agent writes a compact Markdown-superset file; a bundled Node server renders it as a rich, interactive, commentable view in the browser — entirely on 127.0.0.1, no MCP, no network.

entry.title: prism
entry.content: PRISM (Plan Retrieval and Integrated Survey Methodology): a literature-grounded research planning pipeline — problem framing, repository profiling, task/method literature survey, and evidence-grounded plan generation, run as a sequence of criticized Claude Code agent teams.

entry.title: tl-telar
entry.content: Telar — the agentic engineering framework: plan, build, review, and ship, with agents. Cross-platform mobile (React Native & Flutter) with 37 agents, 95 skills, 23 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 19 scripts.

entry.title: arc
entry.content: The full arc from idea to shipped code. Lifecycle workflows for vision, ideation, implementation, review, testing, audit, launch, and commits.

entry.title: ai-geo-by-ivan
entry.content: GEO / AI-search optimization toolkit by Aurelius Ivan Wijaya. A fork of Corey Haines's marketing-skills (CRO, copywriting, SEO, AI SEO, paid ads, ad creative, growth) extended with Ivan's own GEO skills: geo-audit (full AI-search audit + client-ready graph report) and index-on-search-engine (register a site/subdomain on Google + Bing).

entry.title: dev-proposal-toolkit
entry.content: Web・システム開発案件の受注提案を一気通貫でサポートするスキルセット。市場調査→技術設計→UI/UX設計→見積もり→提案書作成までをカバー。

entry.title: ground-check
entry.content: Source-attribution injection + mechanical grounding verification. Makes Claude Code cite machine-checkable artifacts (file:line, tool calls) and verifies those citations against the current filesystem; warn-only by default.

entry.title: agentic-senior-core
entry.content: Universal AI coding rules. Write code like a staff engineer.

entry.title: sway-skills
entry.content: One expert skill for this machine's sway / SwayFX 0.5.3 — window management, config, keybindings, SwayFX effects, swaybar, swaylock/swayidle, inputs, outputs, IPC, swayr, swayimg, and the live palette-theming system.

entry.title: github-manager
entry.content: Claude Code plugin that audits and fixes a GitHub account end-to-end — profile fields, profile README, repo descriptions, topics and project READMEs, interactively and per chosen scope.

entry.title: attention-diff
entry.content: Render GitHub PR diffs with AI-scored attention heatmaps.

entry.title: callback
entry.content: Job application MCP workflows for profile onboarding, resume tailoring, lead scanning, and application review.

entry.title: dcode-agent-kit
entry.content: Scaffold a Deep Agents (LangChain) agent or a dcode CLI agent from one command (/new-dcode-agent). The agents it builds work with any OpenAI-compatible provider.

entry.title: write-code-by-hand
entry.content: Agent Skills for human-authored code with AI-mediated cursor governance.

entry.title: svelte-component-graph
entry.content: Query a Svelte/SvelteKit component dependency graph over MCP — what imports what, unused components, route→component maps, and a component's Svelte 5 props/slots. Bundles the MCP server and the /svelte-graph skill.

entry.title: offspring-claude-skills
entry.content: Personal skills, commands, and workflows for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-front
entry.content: 프론트엔드 개발을 위한 개인 Claude Code 하네스

entry.title: delphin
entry.content: Duplex companion for AI agent CLIs — keep talking while the agent thinks, and recall every conversation. Skill: recall Delphin's local memory, or build/run the wrapper.

entry.title: ios-pro
entry.content: Senior Apple platform review — architecture, security, privacy, SwiftUI, Swift concurrency, accessibility, performance. iOS 18+ / Swift 6.2+.

entry.title: epik
entry.content: Manager-mode feature development on GitHub: converge in CoWork, author the issue graph, launch autonomous builds on Claude Code on the web.

entry.title: toolkit-mcp-server
entry.content: Fast developer utilities — random ID generation, QR codes, IP geolocation, hashing, and encoding — plus gated, fail-closed network and system diagnostics.

entry.title: karpathy-code-guidelines
entry.content: Six Karpathy-inspired principles that stop Claude Code from making silent assumptions, overengineering, doing drive-by refactoring, and patching bugs blindly.

entry.title: reverse-prompt-engineer
entry.content: Reverse-engineer the prompt that most likely produced a given piece of text, via a fan-out guess -> execute (clean room) -> score -> steer workflow with verbatim-leakage and length penalties.

entry.title: undertone
entry.content: On-device audio transcripts you own. Ingest local files, YouTube, podcasts, RSS, Quill, or Google Meet, run local ASR, diarization, and speaker fingerprinting, then browse, search, and export. One skill that routes to a reference per surface.

entry.title: pxp
entry.content: Pivotal Labs–style XP pairing workflow: epic refinement, story slicing, EARS specifications, and strict per-spec TDD with developer approval at every gate.

entry.title: mollie
entry.content: Mollie payment integration — connects Claude to your Mollie account via the Mollie MCP server and activates integration skills for payments, Mollie Components, webhooks, and Mollie Connect.

entry.title: world-cup-oracle
entry.content: World Cup prediction plugin with deterministic Python probabilities, a lightweight provenance-aware data hub, and an isolated national-team model lab for candidate training and walk-forward evaluation. Models remain provisional unless promotion gates pass.

entry.title: constellation
entry.content: Curated skills that work together for a complete dev workflow

entry.title: steakorder
entry.content: Adaptive requirements-elicitation gate. Asks one adaptive question at a time, screens every answer through four quality gates, and produces an ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 Software Requirements Specification. Also regenerates a clean SRS from an existing requirements document.

entry.title: luminaries
entry.content: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.

entry.title: caliber-analysis
entry.content: Analyzes how your team uses Claude Code. Captures session activity — prompts, responses, and tool use — with secrets redacted on your machine before anything is sent, then ships it to your Caliber tenant for AI-governance insights. Bearer-authenticated, idempotent, and non-blocking.

entry.title: omnitune
entry.content: Keep your prompts and skills in tune with the current best practices of whatever AI model you're running. Audits skills/agents and rewrites ad-hoc prompts; model-agnostic, repo-agnostic, self-updating. Open-sourced by Digital Research Group.

entry.title: gabble
entry.content: Gabble — lazy dev + token optimizer. Combines ponytail's YAGNI ladder with aggressive token optimization: precision retrieval, context hygiene, output compression, and cache-aware batching. Less code, fewer tokens, same answers.

entry.title: skill-conductor
entry.content: Create, edit, evaluate, and package Claude Code agent skills — full draft→test→review→improve lifecycle.

entry.title: kick
entry.content: Move a live Claude Code session between your laptop and your own server: hand it off so it survives closing the lid, drive it from your phone, and pull everything back. Code + uncommitted changes + conversation, at the exact position.

entry.title: agenthood-knowledge
entry.content: Knowledge and documentation skills: API references, ADRs, READMEs (the-librarian) and institutional knowledge about member format, naming conventions, and Society structure (the-oracle).

entry.title: aaron-seo-geo
entry.content: 20 SEO/GEO skills and 5 commands on one shared contract for keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, monitoring, quality gates, entity truth, and campaign memory.

entry.title: udflow
entry.content: Universal Dev Flow — risk-proportional multi-agent engineering workflow: plan-gated implementation, selected read-only reviewers, gatekeeper readiness judgment, failure memory, and optional external capabilities (MCP / skills / subagents).

entry.title: building-agents
entry.content: Expert prompt-engineering reference for AI agents on Claude, GPT, and Gemini APIs, plus authoring CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md project-instruction files

entry.title: seeks
entry.content: Self-running, verifier-gated loops with durable .seeks/ state and native worktrees.

entry.title: cc-agents
entry.content: GLM-offload review agents with an auto-convened multi-lens review panel for specs and plans.

entry.title: python-skills
entry.content: Opinionated skills for scaffolding Python projects with an Astral-centric toolchain (uv, ruff, ty), pre-commit, Renovate, CI and Docker.

entry.title: eeshans-skills
entry.content: eeshans-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,396 supported skills.

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: ml-odyssey-skills
entry.content: Skills migrated to ProjectMnemosyne for cross-project reuse

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: second-brain
entry.content: Self-evolving AI second brain. Automatically learns from sessions, discovers tools, maintains a local knowledge base, and self-critiques code quality — getting smarter with every interaction.

entry.title: web-search
entry.content: Web search, content extraction, and research tools for Claude Code. Search the web, Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, X/Twitter, Wikipedia, arXiv, and more — all from your Claude session.

entry.title: harness-kit
entry.content: A portable Claude Code engineering harness — plan → work → verify → feedback discipline as reusable agents, skills, and hooks, plus an `introspect` skill that tailors a .claude/ setup to any repo's tech stack.

entry.title: polygram
entry.content: Telegram integration for Claude Code that preserves the OpenClaw per-chat session model. Migration target for OpenClaw users. Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entry.title: dwsd-md
entry.content: Read, write, and validate DWSD organization entities — the Dynamic Worksystems Design markdown format.

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: keystone
entry.content: Use when the user invokes /keystone or asks Keystone to route product, research, writing, UI, design, planning, implementation, debugging, review, shipping, or health work through its canonical orchestrator.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: nicopowers
entry.content: Nico's personal engineering-process skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, verification, code review, git worktrees, and skill authoring.

entry.title: spec-to-pr
entry.content: Evidence-driven Claude Code plugin for turning briefs, Figma designs, and OpenAPI contracts into verified pull requests.

entry.title: crucible-suite
entry.content: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entry.title: agentdeals
entry.content: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entry.title: agentic-qe
entry.content: Agentic Quality Engineering — AI-powered QE platform with 60 specialized agents, 75+ skills, sublinear coverage analysis, ReasoningBank pattern learning, and deep MCP integration for Claude Code and 11 coding agent platforms

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: orca
entry.content: Spawn, fork, message, follow, or orchestrate Claude Code and Codex agent instances in cmux tabs.
